scope.gitignore: existing .voice-venv, .voice-model-cache, and .voice-tmp rules were reused; no new rule required

profile.selected: Qwen3-ASR 0.6B 8-bit via MLX-Audio + macOS say Yuna
profile.fallback: explicit whisper.cpp STT + macOS say TTS
profile.model_loading: Qwen model import/load is inside the sidecar backend transcribe call; only selected profile or explicit fallback is constructed
profile.evidence_source: .omo/evidence/task-2-voice-local-demo.json; T2 network-deny benchmark passed Qwen 10/10 non-empty and warm RTF 0.0855

baseline.focused_command: .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_chat.py tests/test_config.py tests/test_voice_api.py -k 'disabled or config or chat_endpoint_happy_path'
baseline.red_first_result: VOICE_NETWORK_DENY=1 .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_voice_provider.py failed at collection with ModuleNotFoundError: app.voice_provider before implementation

implementation_contract.shutdown: terminate, bounded wait, kill fallback; SIGTERM exits sidecar cleanly
implementation_contract.audio: ffmpeg decode to private 16 kHz mono PCM; decoded frames, duration, format, and non-silence validated
implementation_contract.tts: one-shot validated WAV/PCM bytes; no persistent URL
implementation_contract.network_deny: VOICE_NETWORK_DENY sets offline model flags and blocks non-loopback TCP while allowing local IPC needed by say
implementation_contract.disabled_mode: app.main import probe reported app.voice_provider not imported when VOICE_ENABLED=false

validation.command: VOICE_NETWORK_DENY=1 .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_voice_provider.py tests/test_voice_api.py tests/test_chat.py tests/test_config.py tests/test_security.py
sidecar kill during STT with valid PCM and 45 second join bound
validation.result: provider_timeout within bound; /api/chat returned 200; temp artifacts absent

validation.command: VOICE_NETWORK_DENY=1 sidecar TTS followed by ffprobe -v error -show_entries stream=codec_name,sample_rate,channels -of json
validation.result: pcm_s16le, 22050 Hz, mono; temp artifacts absent

validation.command: VOICE_NETWORK_DENY=1 .voice-venv sidecar Qwen smoke on tests/fixtures/voice-ko/01.wav
validation.result: health passed and selected Qwen returned non-empty transcription; no model download

adversarial_classes.malformed_input: covered: corrupt, silent, decoded-short, decoded-long audio and invalid TTS WAV
adversarial_classes.stale_state_generated_temp_artifacts: covered: per-request TemporaryDirectory cleanup on success, failure, timeout, cancellation, and sidecar shutdown
adversarial_classes.dirty_worktree: covered: pre-existing dirty tracked/untracked files preserved; only T4-owned paths staged
adversarial_classes.hung_long_command: covered: hang_stt failure returned stable provider_timeout under bounded test timeout; production STT cap is 45 seconds
adversarial_classes.flaky_timing: covered: provider test suite passed twice consecutively after fake harness timeout was separated from production timeout constants
adversarial_classes.misleading_success_output: covered: direct TestClient chat status, direct sidecar failure exception, and ffprobe stream metadata were asserted
adversarial_classes.repeated_interruptions: covered: sidecar close is idempotent and SIGTERM shutdown was verified
adversarial_classes.prompt_injection: not_applicable: T4 returns provider text to the T3 contract; no prompt construction or model instruction boundary is crossed
adversarial_classes.cancel_resume: cancel cleanup covered; resume not_applicable because T4 has no resumable job

cleanup_receipt.exact: No model weights, raw browser audio, provider request bodies, persistent audio URLs, or repo temp artifacts were added. TemporaryDirectory cleanup assertions passed. Port 8600 PID 40748 was stopped. No reset, checkout, stash, delete, push, PR, merge, amend, or unrelated formatting was run.
